nasb.text: But Er, Judah’s firstborn, was evil in the sight of the Lord, so the Lord took his life.

esv.text: But Er, Judah’s firstborn, was wicked in the sight of the Lord, and the Lord put him to death.

cnv.text: 猶大的長子珥，在耶和華眼中是個惡人，所以耶和華取去他的性命。

ccb.text: 耶和华见珥行为邪恶，就取走了他的性命。

csbs.text: 犹大的长子珥在耶和华眼中看为恶，耶和华就使他丧了命。
